response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with strong skills in TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, but his primary expertise lies in web and mobile development rather than C++ or industrial automation. His resume shows no significant experience with C++ beyond a brief role at National Instruments, and he lacks demonstrated experience with the specific industrial protocols (e.g., OPC UA, Modbus TCP/IP) and cloud platforms (e.g., Azure) required for this role. His background in cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443 is also not evident.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in scalable systems and high-performance applications.
Demonstrated ability to work across full-stack development and contribute to architectural decisions.
Experience in open-source projects and mentoring, indicating a collaborative and knowledge-sharing mindset.
concerns: Limited C++ experience, with the most relevant role being short-term and not focused on industrial automation or on-premises/cloud solutions.
No clear evidence of expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle practices.
Lacks demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (e.g., OPC UA, Modbus TCP/IP) or cloud platforms (e.g., Azure).

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and relevant protocols knowledge
